description: A landscape showing a vast sky filled with dramatic clouds illuminated by a setting sun. Warm pink, orange, and gold tones dominate the upper portion, while darker blue-gray clouds gather above. Below, a low heathland stretches to the horizon with a windmill silhouetted against the glowing sky at center right. A small solitary figure in red walks along a path at the lower left. Dark vegetation and scrubland fill the foreground.
